columns.name: id
columns.definition: id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()

columns.name: is_sponsored
columns.definition: is_sponsored BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false

columns.name: license_has
columns.definition: license_has BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false

columns.name: created_at
columns.definition: created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()

columns.name: updated_at
columns.definition: updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()

columns.name: department_id
columns.definition: department_id UUID REFERENCES public.departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: position_id
columns.definition: position_id UUID REFERENCES public.positions(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: role_id
columns.definition: role_id UUID REFERENCES public.roles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: created_by
columns.definition: created_by uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: updated_by
columns.definition: updated_by uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: employees_name_not_empty
constraints.statement:
CONSTRAINT employees_name_not_empty
  CHECK (name IS NOT NULL AND length(btrim(name)) > 0)

policies.name: unified_select_policy
unified_insert_policy
policies.statement:
CREATE POLICY "unified_insert_policy" ON public.employees FOR INSERT
WITH CHECK (
  is_active_user(auth.uid()) AND (
    has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'hr'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'operations'::app_role)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.user_permissions up
      WHERE up.user_id = auth.uid()
        AND up.permission_key = 'employees'
        AND up.can_edit = true
    )
  )
);

policies.name: unified_update_policy
policies.statement:
CREATE POLICY "unified_update_policy" ON public.employees FOR UPDATE
USING (
  is_active_user(auth.uid()) AND (
    has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'hr'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'operations'::app_role)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.user_permissions up
      WHERE up.user_id = auth.uid()
        AND up.permission_key = 'employees'
        AND up.can_edit = true
    )
  )
)
WITH CHECK (
  is_active_user(auth.uid()) AND (
    has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'hr'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'operations'::app_role)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.user_permissions up
      WHERE up.user_id = auth.uid()
        AND up.permission_key = 'employees'
        AND up.can_edit = true
    )
  )
);

policies.name: unified_delete_policy
policies.statement:
CREATE POLICY "unified_delete_policy" ON public.employees FOR DELETE
USING (
  is_active_user(auth.uid()) AND (
    has_role(auth.uid(), 'admin'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'hr'::app_role)
    OR has_role(auth.uid(), 'operations'::app_role)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM public.user_permissions up
      WHERE up.user_id = auth.uid()
        AND up.permission_key = 'employees'
        AND up.can_delete = true
    )
  )
);

triggers.name: trg_employees_updated_at
triggers.statement: CREATE TRIGGER trg_employees_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.employees FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION public.update_updated_at_column();

triggers.name: trg_employee_sponsorship_alerts
triggers.statement:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_employee_sponsorship_alerts
  AFTER UPDATE OF sponsorship_status ON public.employees
  FOR EACH ROW
  EXECUTE FUNCTION public.fn_handle_employee_sponsorship_alerts();

triggers.name: trg_employees_set_audit_columns

indexes.name: idx_employees_role_id
indexes.statement: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_employees_role_id ON public.employees(role_id);

indexes.name: idx_employees_commercial_record
idx_employees_residency_expiry
idx_employees_department_id
indexes.statement: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "idx_employees_department_id" ON public."employees" ("department_id");

indexes.name: idx_employees_position_id
indexes.statement: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "idx_employees_position_id" ON public."employees" ("position_id");

indexes.name: idx_employees_created_by
indexes.statement: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "idx_employees_created_by" ON public."employees" ("created_by");

indexes.name: idx_employees_updated_by
indexes.statement: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "idx_employees_updated_by" ON public."employees" ("updated_by");

indexes.name: idx_employees_name
indexes.statement: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_employees_name ON public.employees(name);

trigger_functions.name: update_updated_at_column
fn_handle_employee_sponsorship_alerts
set_audit_columns
